title: Grassy Quinoa Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful quinoa bowl with a delicate Peruvian twist. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. Rinse the quinoa in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
2. In a medium saucepan, heat the Peruvian olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the red onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the quinoa to the saucepan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the quinoa is tender and the water has been absorbed.
7. Fluff the quinoa with a fork and season with salt to taste.
8. In a large bowl, combine the cooked quinoa, mixed greens, and cherry tomatoes.
